proof:
apply Nat.dvd_one.mp
  have h : 3 * (14 * n + 3) = 2 * (21 * n + 4) + 1 := by ring
  have h₁ : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) ∣ 3 * (14 * n + 3) :=
    (Nat.gcd_dvd_right _ _).trans (Nat.dvd_mul_left _ 3)
  rw [h] at h₁
  exact (Nat.dvd_add_right ((Nat.gcd_dvd_left _ _).trans (Nat.dvd_mul_left _ 2))).mp h₁
failed_attempts:
apply Nat.eq_one_of_dvd_one
  have h : 2 * (21 * n + 4) + 1 = 3 * (14 * n + 3) := by ring
  have : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) ∣ 3 * (14 * n + 3) :=
    Nat.dvd_trans (Nat.gcd_dvd_right _ _) (Nat.dvd_mul_right _ 3)
  rw [← h] at this
  exact (Nat.dvd_add_right (Nat.dvd_trans (Nat.gcd_dvd_left _ _) (Nat.dvd_mul_right _ 2))).mp this

rw [show 21 * n + 4 = 7 * n + 1 + 1 * (14 * n + 3) by ring]
  rw [Nat.gcd_add_mul_right]
  rw [Nat.gcd_comm]
  rw [show 14 * n + 3 = 1 + 2 * (7 * n + 1) by ring]
  rw [Nat.gcd_add_mul_right]
  exact Nat.gcd_one_left _

apply Nat.coprime_of_dvd'
  intro k h₁ h₂
  have h₃ : 3 * (14 * n + 3) = 2 * (21 * n + 4) + 1 := by ring
  have h₄ : k ∣ 3 * (14 * n + 3) := dvd_trans h₂ (dvd_mul_right _ 3)
  have h₅ : k ∣ 2 * (21 * n + 4) := dvd_trans h₁ (dvd_mul_right _ 2)
  rw [h₃] at h₄
  exact (Nat.dvd_add_right h₅).mp h₄

apply Nat.eq_one_of_dvd_one
  have h : 3 * (14 * n + 3) = 2 * (21 * n + 4) + 1 := by ring
  rw [← Nat.dvd_add_iff_left (Nat.dvd_trans (Nat.gcd_dvd_left _ _) (Nat.dvd_mul_right _ 2))]
  rw [← h]
  exact Nat.dvd_trans (Nat.gcd_dvd_right _ _) (Nat.dvd_mul_right _ 3)

apply Nat.isCoprime_iff_coprime.mp
  use -2, 3
  ring

apply Nat.eq_one_of_dvd_one
  have h : 3 * (14 * n + 3) = 2 * (21 * n + 4) + 1 := by ring
  apply (Nat.dvd_add_iff_left (Nat.dvd_trans (Nat.gcd_dvd_left _ _) (Nat.dvd_mul_left _ 2))).mp
  rw [← h]
  exact Nat.dvd_trans (Nat.gcd_dvd_right _ _) (Nat.dvd_mul_left _ 3)

have h : 3 * (14 * n + 3) = 2 * (21 * n + 4) + 1 := by ring
  apply Nat.dvd_one.mp
  apply Nat.dvd_of_dvd_add_left (Nat.dvd_trans (Nat.gcd_dvd_left _ _) (Nat.dvd_mul_right _ 2))
  rw [← h]
  exact Nat.dvd_trans (Nat.gcd_dvd_right _ _) (Nat.dvd_mul_right _ 3)

rw [show 21 * n + 4 = (7 * n + 1) + 1 * (14 * n + 3) by ring]
  rw [Nat.gcd_add_mul_left]
  rw [show 14 * n + 3 = 1 + 2 * (7 * n + 1) by ring]
  rw [Nat.gcd_add_mul_right]
  exact Nat.gcd_one_right _

apply Nat.eq_one_of_dvd_one
  have : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) ∣ 3 * (14 * n + 3) - 2 * (21 * n + 4) := by
    apply Nat.dvd_sub (by linarith)
    · apply Nat.dvd_mul_of_dvd_right; apply Nat.gcd_dvd_right
    · apply Nat.dvd_mul_of_dvd_right; apply Nat.gcd_dvd_left
  rwa [show 3 * (14 * n + 3) - 2 * (21 * n + 4) = 1 by ring] at this

apply Nat.dvd_one.mp
  have : 3 * (14 * n + 3) - 2 * (21 * n + 4) = 1 := by ring
  rw [← this]
  apply Nat.dvd_sub
  · exact (Nat.gcd_dvd_right _ _).trans (Nat.dvd_mul_right _ _)
  · exact (Nat.gcd_dvd_left _ _).trans (Nat.dvd_mul_right _ _)
  · linarith

rw [show 21 * n + 4 = 7 * n + 1 + 1 * (14 * n + 3) by ring, Nat.gcd_add_mul_left]
  rw [show 14 * n + 3 = 1 + 2 * (7 * n + 1) by ring, Nat.gcd_add_mul_right]
  exact Nat.gcd_one_right _

have h1 : 21 * n + 4 = 7 * n + 1 + (14 * n + 3) := by ring
  rw [h1, Nat.gcd_add_self_left, Nat.gcd_comm]
  have h2 : 14 * n + 3 = 2 * (7 * n + 1) + 1 := by ring
  have h3 : 1 < 7 * n + 1 := by linarith
  rw [h2, Nat.gcd_rec, Nat.add_mul_mod_self_right, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt h3, Nat.gcd_one_right]

rw [show 21 * n + 4 = (7 * n + 1) + 1 * (14 * n + 3) by ring, Nat.gcd_add_mul_left_right]
  rw [Nat.gcd_comm, show 14 * n + 3 = 1 + 2 * (7 * n + 1) by ring]
  rw [Nat.gcd_add_mul_left_right, Nat.gcd_one_left]

rw [show 21 * n + 4 = 7 * n + 1 + (14 * n + 3) by ring]
  rw [Nat.gcd_add_self_right]
  rw [show 14 * n + 3 = 1 + (7 * n + 1) * 2 by ring]
  rw [Nat.gcd_add_mul_right]
  exact Nat.gcd_one_right _

have h1 : 21 * n + 4 = 1 * (14 * n + 3) + (7 * n + 1) := by ring
  have h2 : 14 * n + 3 = 2 * (7 * n + 1) + 1 := by ring
  rw [Nat.gcd_rec, h1, Nat.add_mul_mod_self_left, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (by linarith)]
  rw [Nat.gcd_rec, h2, Nat.add_mul_mod_self_left, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (by linarith)]
  exact Nat.gcd_one_right _

apply Nat.dvd_one.mp
  have h : 3 * (14 * n + 3) = 2 * (21 * n + 4) + 1 := by ring
  rw [← Nat.add_sub_cancel_left (2 * (21 * n + 4)) 1, ← h]
  apply Nat.dvd_sub (by linarith)
  · exact Nat.dvd_trans (Nat.gcd_dvd_right _ _) (Nat.dvd_mul_left _ _)
  · exact Nat.dvd_trans (Nat.gcd_dvd_left _ _) (Nat.dvd_mul_left _ _)

have h : 3 * (14 * n + 3) = 2 * (21 * n + 4) + 1 := by ring
  apply Nat.dvd_one.mp
  apply Nat.dvd_add_right
  · exact Nat.dvd_trans (Nat.gcd_dvd_left _ _) (Nat.dvd_mul_left _ 2)
  · rw [← h]
    exact Nat.dvd_trans (Nat.gcd_dvd_right _ _) (Nat.dvd_mul_left _ 3)

apply Nat.dvd_one.mp
  have h : 3 * (14 * n + 3) = 1 + 2 * (21 * n + 4) := by ring
  rw [← Nat.sub_eq_of_eq_add h]
  apply Nat.dvd_sub (by linarith)
  · exact Nat.dvd_trans (Nat.gcd_dvd_right _ _) (Nat.dvd_mul_left _ _)
  · exact Nat.dvd_trans (Nat.gcd_dvd_left _ _) (Nat.dvd_mul_left _ _)

apply Nat.dvd_one.mp
  have h : 3 * (14 * n + 3) - 2 * (21 * n + 4) = 1 := by ring
  rw [← h]
  refine Nat.dvd_sub (by linarith) ?_ ?_
  · exact Nat.dvd_trans (Nat.gcd_dvd_right ..) (dvd_mul_right _ 3)
  · exact Nat.dvd_trans (Nat.gcd_dvd_left ..) (dvd_mul_right _ 2)

apply Nat.dvd_one.mp
  have h : 3 * (14 * n + 3) - 2 * (21 * n + 4) = 1 := by ring
  rw [← h]
  apply Nat.dvd_sub (by linarith)
  · exact Nat.dvd_trans (Nat.gcd_dvd_right _ _) (by use 3; ring)
  · exact Nat.dvd_trans (Nat.gcd_dvd_left _ _) (by use 2; ring)

rw [show 21 * n + 4 = 7 * n + 1 + (14 * n + 3) * 1 by ring, Nat.gcd_add_mul_right]
  rw [Nat.gcd_comm, show 14 * n + 3 = 1 + (7 * n + 1) * 2 by ring, Nat.gcd_add_mul_right]
  exact Nat.gcd_one_left _

rw [Nat.gcd_comm]
  apply Nat.coprime_of_mul_eq_mul_add_one (m := 3) (n := 2)
  ring

rw [Nat.gcd_comm, Nat.gcd_rec]
  rw [show 21 * n + 4 = (7 * n + 1) + (14 * n + 3) * 1 by ring]
  rw [Nat.add_mul_mod_self_left, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (by linarith)]
  rw [Nat.gcd_comm, Nat.gcd_rec]
  rw [show 14 * n + 3 = 1 + (7 * n + 1) * 2 by ring]
  rw [Nat.add_mul_mod_self_left, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (by linarith)]
  exact Nat.gcd_one_left _

have h1 : 21 * n + 4 = (7 * n + 1) + 1 * (14 * n + 3) := by ring
  rw [h1, Nat.gcd_add_mul_left, Nat.gcd_comm]
  have h2 : 14 * n + 3 = 1 + 2 * (7 * n + 1) := by ring
  rw [h2, Nat.gcd_add_mul_left, Nat.gcd_one_left]

apply Nat.eq_one_of_dvd_one
  have h : 3 * (14 * n + 3) = 2 * (21 * n + 4) + 1 := by ring
  rw [← Nat.dvd_add_iff_left (Nat.dvd_trans (Nat.gcd_dvd_left _ _) (Nat.dvd_mul_left _ 2))]
  rw [← h]
  exact Nat.dvd_trans (Nat.gcd_dvd_right _ _) (Nat.dvd_mul_left _ 3)

rw [Nat.gcd_sub_left (by linarith)]
  rw [show 21 * n + 4 - (14 * n + 3) = 7 * n + 1 by ring]
  rw [Nat.gcd_comm, Nat.gcd_sub_left (by linarith)]
  rw [show 14 * n + 3 - (7 * n + 1) = 7 * n + 2 by ring]
  rw [Nat.gcd_sub_left (by linarith)]
  rw [show 7 * n + 2 - (7 * n + 1) = 1 by ring]
  exact Nat.gcd_one_left _

have : IsCoprime (21 * n + 4 : ℤ) (14 * n + 3) := ⟨-2, 3, by ring⟩
  exact_mod_cast this.gcd_eq_one

rw [show 21 * n + 4 = 7 * n + 1 + 1 * (14 * n + 3) by ring]
  rw [Nat.gcd_add_mul_left]
  rw [show 14 * n + 3 = 1 + 2 * (7 * n + 1) by ring]
  rw [Nat.gcd_add_mul_right]
  rw [Nat.gcd_one_right]

have h : 3 * (14 * n + 3) = 2 * (21 * n + 4) + 1 := by ring
  apply Nat.dvd_one.mp
  rw [← Nat.dvd_add_iff_left ((Nat.gcd_dvd_left _ _).trans (Nat.dvd_mul_right _ 2)), ← h]
  exact (Nat.gcd_dvd_right _ _).trans (Nat.dvd_mul_right _ 3)

apply Nat.dvd_one.mp
  rw [← Nat.sub_eq_of_eq_add (show 3 * (14 * n + 3) = 2 * (21 * n + 4) + 1 by ring)]
  exact Nat.dvd_sub (by linarith)
    (Nat.dvd_trans (Nat.gcd_dvd_right _ _) (Nat.dvd_mul_left _ _))
    (Nat.dvd_trans (Nat.gcd_dvd_left _ _) (Nat.dvd_mul_left _ _))

have h1 : 21 * n + 4 = (7 * n + 1) + 1 * (14 * n + 3) := by ring
  rw [h1, Nat.gcd_add_mul_left, Nat.gcd_comm]
  have h2 : 14 * n + 3 = 1 + 2 * (7 * n + 1) := by ring
  rw [h2, Nat.gcd_add_mul_left, Nat.gcd_one_left]
successful_attempts:
apply Nat.dvd_one.mp
  have h : 3 * (14 * n + 3) = 2 * (21 * n + 4) + 1 := by ring
  have h₁ : Nat.gcd (21 * n + 4) (14 * n + 3) ∣ 3 * (14 * n + 3) :=
    (Nat.gcd_dvd_right _ _).trans (Nat.dvd_mul_left _ 3)
  rw [h] at h₁
  exact (Nat.dvd_add_right ((Nat.gcd_dvd_left _ _).trans (Nat.dvd_mul_left _ 2))).mp h₁
